case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. KYNE, KEVIN M.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KYNE, KEVIN M. $8,550.56 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,630.56
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $3,071.89 INTEREST, $7.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AND COUNTER-CLAIM FILED BY MARIN COUNTY SHERIFF'S DEPT.
SERVICE FEE FILESAFE FILED BY DEFENDANT KYNE, KEVIN M.
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT HEARING SET FOR JUN-10-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 501

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 501, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, CALENDAR OF JUN-10-1998, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER EXCEPT FOR THE SUM OF $20.00 TO BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAY PERIOD; ASSUMES PAID EVERY WEEK. LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE 1/2 EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR & 1/2 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $2,733.41 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KYNE, KEVIN M.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $312.36 AS TO DEFENDANT KYNE, KEVIN M.
